creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
eadler      2012-01-13 04:38:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-drivers/xf86-video-ati Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  Update to 6.14.3
  
  Changes:
  
       * Support for more cards, in particular Llano APUs.
       * vdpau/XvMC support (currently only available for >= R3xx via
         Gallium3D).
       * Tiling fixes, enable it on more cards by default.
       * And many more!
  
  PR:             ports/162592
  Submitted by:   wblock
  Reviewed by:    Alex Keda <admin@lissyara.su>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.31      +1 -1      ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-ati/Makefile
  1.21      +2 -2      ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-ati/distinfo
